onset.Description: the onset time of the event in samples, relative to the start of the EEG file

stimfilename.Description: name of the stimulus that was shown (including path)

stim.Description: name of the stimulus that was shown

food_idx.Description: is the stimulus a food (1) or non-food object (0)

letter.Description: letter that was shown op top of the stimulus. Letter task only

letter_idx.Description: index of the letter that was shown op top of the stimulus. Letter task only

istarget.Description: stimulus is not a target (0) or is a target (1), used in the letter task only

image_number.Description: ID number of the stimulus that was shown

response.Description: if 1, ppt responded. Used in letter task only

correct.Description: did the ppt give the correct response? Used in letter task only

time_stimon.Description: time the stimulus is presented, resets for each part

time_stimoff.Description: time the stimulus is taken away, resets for each part
